name: Kurenai Yuhi | The Rose in the Hot Springs
description:
After an exhausting erm… ‘battle’ for your last wife, you are overworked and exhausted. It’s time for a vacation away from it all. A nice resort, relaxing hot springs, a certain red eyed MILF… Wait what?

*Make-Out Series 6. This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.*

*Side note: I gave up on Kurenai’s bandage outfit, the AI just read it as a makeshift outfit every time so her outfit is a mix of later stuff and what I’d assume works, don’t sue me here.*
creator: Samuelz
